nodes.name: Quick Germination
nodes.description: First Summon each combat gains +1 Growth.

nodes.name: Colony Instinct
nodes.description: Plant attacks gain +1 damage per alive plant.

nodes.name: Spore Momentum
nodes.description: When a plant evolves, draw 1 card.

nodes.name: Verdant Legion
nodes.description: If 3+ plants are alive, your turn-end plant cycle adds a free support pulse.

nodes.name: Bark Plating
nodes.description: Newly summoned plants gain bonus Block.

nodes.name: Symbiotic Aegis
nodes.description: When you gain Block, your lowest-HP plant gains a mirrored portion.

nodes.name: Photosynthetic Repair
nodes.description: Support plants heal extra each support action.

nodes.name: Citadel Grove
nodes.description: Once per turn, the first plant that would die survives at 1 HP and grants Artifact 1.

nodes.name: Volatile Sap
nodes.description: Cards that sacrifice plants deal 25% more attack damage.

nodes.name: Predatory Roots
nodes.description: First attack spell each turn applies Weak 1.

nodes.name: Cannibal Reactor
nodes.description: When a plant dies, gain +1 energy next turn (max once per turn).

nodes.name: Toxic Recursion
nodes.description: Sacrificing a Mature plant shuffles Thorn Jab into your draw pile.

nodes.name: Apex Protocol
nodes.description: After sacrificing a plant, the next plant-targeting card resolves twice.

nodes.name: Adaptive Canopy
nodes.description: Max hand size +1 on turns where a plant evolved.

nodes.name: Mycorrhizal Network
nodes.description: Support actions also grant minor attack bonus to a random attack plant.

nodes.name: Seed Archive
nodes.description: The first plant card you play each combat costs 1 less.
